/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -mavx2 -mfma -mbmi2 -mpopcnt -ffast-math -funroll-loops -flto=auto -fno-rtti -O3 -DNDEBUG  -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nnue_engine.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nnue_engine.dir/nnue_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nnue_engine.dir/nnue.cpp.o -o nnue_engine  -lpthread
